version_note: 0.2.0: C9 enrichment — added field_types, target_fields per action_type, sample_payload references, retention_per_domain. Still 'design intent' per /spec/README.md banner; not yet 'buildable'. See /spec/versioning.md for SemVer policy.
name: GPS Tour Interpretation · Substrate Audit Event Taxonomy
description: Machine-readable companion to Slide 15 (Substrate) of the pitch deck. Defines the audit domains, action types, trigger rules, evidence schema, field types, and sample payload references for /spec/logging.md and /spec/payloads.md.

entry_id.description: Sortable unique id; embeds the millisecond timestamp.

prior_event_id.description: Chains an event to a prior event; null for chain origin.

pii_flag.description: True if target.fields contains identifiable visitor data.

audit_domains.intent: BARS observations remain reproducible across observers and across time.
Every promotion and insignia award is backed by a complete evidence chain.
Module completion certificates correspond to actual validated outputs.
Incidents are recorded, resolved, and aggregated for architectural feedback.

action_types.description: An observer records one BARS anchor instance.
A second observer verifies a prior OBSERVE_BARS entry.
Quarterly cross-region calibration session yields a drift metric.
Promote a staff member from tier N to tier N+1.
Issue the visible insignia for a tier (follows PROMOTE_TIER).
Revoke a tier when evidence chain fails on audit.
Staff enrols in a training module (M1–M9).
Staff submits the validation deliverable for a module.
Module-rubric validation outcome (pass / fail) is recorded.
A C1 or C2 incident is recorded.
An incident is closed with resolution and D3 loop-back tag.
A change is committed to the script library.
A piece of visitor feedback enters the D3 loop.

then: freeze affected-tier PROMOTE_TIER decisions until drift returns < 0.15
log a CALIBRATE_QUARTERLY event with context_tag including the prior drift value
notify the L4+ mentor of record
require the missing evidence within 30 days or the request expires
if the void cascades to a PROMOTE_TIER, reset tier to prior
notify the staff member of remediation path
raise architecture-layer recall: agenda for the next quarterly review
tag affected capability numbers in the recall notice
if the same class recurs >3 times for two consecutive quarters, escalate to Global Training Council

evidence_schema.note: An evidence record is valid only if recorded by an actor with tier >= L3 OR if cross-confirmed by a DOUBLE_VERIFY from such an actor.

out_of_scope: Visitor-facing surfaces (staff workflow only in this iteration)
Cross-organisation data sharing beyond quarterly drift metrics
